title: Exercises: Elliptic Curve Foundations
description: Hands-on exercises implementing elliptic curve operations

exercises.title: Point Addition
exercises.task: Create a function that adds two points on an elliptic curve.
exercises.starterCode:
def ec_add(P: tuple, Q: tuple, a: int, p: int) -> tuple:
    """Add points P and Q on y² = x³ + ax + b over F_p.
    
    Points are (x, y) tuples or None for infinity.
    """
    pass
hints: Use Fermat's little theorem for modular inverse

exercises.title: Scalar Multiplication
exercises.task: Compute kP for scalar k and point P efficiently.
hints: Handle negative k by negating point

exercises.title: j-Invariant Calculator
exercises.description: Compute the j-invariant of an elliptic curve.

exercises.title: Point Order Calculator
exercises.description: Find the order of a point on an elliptic curve.
exercises.task: Compute the smallest n such that nP = O.
hints: Keep adding P until reaching O
